name: Devils Food Cake (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
Makes one layer cake.
1. Combine all ingredients except eggs in a mixing bowl and blend at low speed.
2. Beat on medium speed for 1 minute.
3. Add eggs and beat an additional 1 minute.
4. If the cake is to be removed before icing, place a few dabs of shortening in the bottom of a 9-inch glass baking dish. Cover with wax paper.
5. If the cake is to be iced in the baking dish, pour batter evenly into the dish.
6. Microwave at 50% power for 5 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn every 3 minutes.
7. Increase power to High and microwave for an additional 2 to 5 minutes or until done.
8. Let stand on counter top for 5 to 10 minutes before removing from dish.
If solid chocolate is used, melt in a glass measuring cup at 50% power for 2 to 4 minutes per square. To soften pre-melted chocolate in the packets, microwave in envelope for 10 seconds on High.
